user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: 3-phase center-aligned complementary PWM on GTM TOM1 (Cluster_1) at 20 kHz using cmuFxclk0, with 1 µs rising/falling hardware dead time, synchronous start and synchronous updates; drive phases U/V/W on pins U HS=P02.0, U LS=P02.7; V HS=P02.1, V LS=P02.4; W HS=P02.2, W LS=P02.5; duty units in percent with initial U/V/W=25/50/75, step=10, wrap rule: if (duty+step) >= 100 then duty = 0 then add step; update every 500 ms from STM. Add GTM enable guard, an empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction stub, and a GTM ATOM ISR (priority 20) toggling LED P13.0.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Upgrade from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to unified high-level IfxGtm_Pwm on TOM1 Cluster_1. Use IfxGtm_Pwm_initConfig/IfxGtm_Pwm_init to configure center-aligned complementary outputs with dead-time via driver configuration, clocked from FXCLK0. Apply pin routing with IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout to map TOUT pins to P02.{0,1,2,4,5,7}. Start PWM synchronously with IfxGtm_Pwm_startSyncedChannels and perform duty updates using IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDuty (deferred, to honor synchronous update). Guard with IfxGtm_isEnabled/IfxGtm_enable and enable FXCLK0 via IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks. Schedule 500 ms duty stepping via STM. Provide empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction and configure a GTM ATOM timer + ISR using IfxGtm_Atom_Timer and IfxCpu_Irq/IfxSrc to toggle P13.0 at the chosen rate.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: User explicitly requested upgrading to the unified high-level PWM driver. IfxGtm_Pwm supports synchronized start/update, multi-channel duty updates, and frequency/dead-time management suitable for center-aligned complementary PWM on TOM. It simplifies configuration compared to submodule-specific drivers while meeting all requirements.

runtime_function.name: GTM_TOM_3_Phase_Inverter_PWM_updateDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Update U/V/W duty cycles in percent every 500 ms with step=10 and wrap rule, using deferred update to apply synchronously at the next PWM period.

api_changes.reason: Unified API updates channel duty values (supports synchronous update)
Mode and dead-time handled in unified driver configuration

migration_notes.context_preserved: All original PWM functional requirements are kept: TOM1 Cluster_1 center-aligned complementary outputs at 20 kHz from FXCLK0 with 1 µs dead-time, synchronous start/update, specified pin mapping, percent-based initial duties and stepping with 500 ms STM scheduling, GTM enable guard, an empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction, and a GTM ATOM-based ISR (priority 20) to toggle LED P13.0. Only the driver layer is upgraded to IfxGtm_Pwm using template-verified APIs.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
